what: Display a knowledge entry with collapsible sections and a markdown/plain-text content toggle
why: Reduces visual noise by collapsing optional metadata while always showing the title and content

content_section.height: fills remaining page height (no max-h cap)

decisions.reason: Add markdown rendering toggle to content view
decisions.rationale: Users need to see both the rendered markdown (readable) and raw text (inspectable). Default is markdown. State is owned by the hook; MarkdownContent is a shared UI component driven by marked v17.

decisions.reason: Collapsible sections for metadata, content always visible
decisions.rationale: Main fields (category, description, tags) always rendered but collapsible (expanded by default) to keep the page focused. Additional fields (rules, required_knowledge) collapsed by default since they are less frequently needed. Content is always shown without height cap so users can read the full entry.
